1: The field of artificial intelligence is at a fascinating inflection point. We are moving beyond
2: building models that can simply process information to creating intelligent systems that can
3: reason, plan, and act to achieve complex goals with ambiguous tasks. These "agentic"
4: systems, as this book so aptly describes them, represent the next frontier in AI, and their
5: development is a challenge that excites and inspires us at Google.
6: "Agentic Design Patterns: A Hands-On Guide to Building Intelligent Systems" arrives at the
7: perfect moment to guide us on this journey. The book rightly points out that the power of
8: large language models, the cognitive engines of these agents, must be harnessed with
9: structure and thoughtful design. Just as design patterns revolutionized software engineering
10: by providing a common language and reusable solutions to common problems, the agentic
11: patterns in this book will be foundational for building robust, scalable, and reliable intelligent
13: The metaphor of a "canvas" for building agentic systems is one that resonates deeply with
14: our work on Google's Vertex AI platform. We strive to provide developers with the most
15: powerful and flexible canvas on which to build the next generation of AI applications. This
16: book provides the practical, hands-on guidance that will empower developers to use that
17: canvas to its full potential. By exploring patterns from prompt chaining and tool use to
18: agent-to-agent collaboration, self-correction, safety and guardrails, this book offers a
19: comprehensive toolkit for any developer looking to build sophisticated AI agents.
20: The future of AI will be defined by the creativity and ingenuity of developers who can build
21: these intelligent systems. "Agentic Design Patterns" is an indispensable resource that will
22: help to unlock that creativity. It provides the essential knowledge and practical examples to
23: not only understand the "what" and "why" of agentic systems, but also the "how."
24: I am thrilled to see this book in the hands of the developer community. The patterns and
25: principles within these pages will undoubtedly accelerate the development of innovative and
26: impactful AI applications that will shape our world for years to come.
